I'm replacing the hardcoded height value with a computed style constant using the existing ratio. I'm replacing the hardcoded height value with an inline style using dynamic calculation. 

**Updating text styles**

I'm applying uppercase text transform to the badge text. I'm adjusting the hero image frame with border radius and overflow hidden. I'm adding useMemo for the hero movie and adjusting button layouts with flex properties. I'm refactoring the hero movie selection logic to improve performance. 

I'm simplifying the hero movie selection logic to use a cleaner sequential lookup pattern. I'm refactoring the movie selection logic to use a cleaner sequential lookup pattern. I'm computing the hero backdrop URI with useMemo for performance. 

I'm moving the hero useMemo and strings after genreList is defined to ensure proper dependency order. I'm refactoring the hero backdrop logic to use `data.genres.genres` instead of local `genreList` to avoid dependency order issues. 

**Refactoring hooks**

I'm moving the `heroMovie` useMemo hook to the top of the component to comply with React hook rules. I'm updating the hero useMemo to use trendingResults which handles null data gracefully. I'm adding `heroBackdropUri` to the render phase after confirming `hero` is not null. I'm extracting `heroBackdropUri` and `heroDescription` constants in the render phase after confirming `hero` is not null. I'm extracting `heroBackdropUri` and `heroDescription` constants after `genreList` in the function body. I'm moving `heroBackdropUri` and `heroDescription` calculations after the loading check to comply with hooks ordering rules. 

I'm moving `heroMovie`, `heroBackdropUri`, and `heroDescription` calculations to the top of the component to comply with hooks ordering rules. I'm extracting hero backdrop URI and description text calculations into memoized values. I'm moving useMemo declarations to run after heroMovie's useMemo for better organization. </details></think>

## Summary

### What changed
- **Home hero banner** in `src/screens/HomeScreen.tsx`: 16:9 backdrop (like Search’s featured area), bottom **LinearGradient** (`transparent` → `colors.surface` like `DetailScreen`), “New release” pill (`primary_container`), uppercase title, overview when TMDB returns it, otherwise the same year/genre line as other cards, and a **row of two actions** with **`flex: 1` + shared `minHeight`** so **Watch** / **Now** (with play icon) and **Details** (uppercase) stay **same width and height** in parallel.
- **Data**: Featured title is **trending → top rated → discover** (current genre or first genre rail) so something shows whenever the home feed has movies.
- **Types**: `MovieListItem` in `src/api/types.ts` includes optional **`overview`** (TMDB list rows usually send it) for the blurb.
- **Theme**: `src/theme/colors.ts` adds **`hero_button_secondary`** (muted Details button) so the screen stays free of ad-hoc hex.
- **Loading UI**: `src/components/skeletons/HomeScreenSkeleton.tsx` updated to a 16:9 hero + dual CTA shims.

### Why
- Reuses the Search **landscape + badge** style and the Detail/Search **scrim** pattern, and matches the attached layout: content anchored at the **bottom** of the banner with **coral** primary and **semitransparent** secondary CTA.
- `overview` is optional on the type so copy can match the design without an extra request when the API already returns it.

### Files touched
- `streamlist/src/screens/HomeScreen.tsx`
- `streamlist/src/api/types.ts`
- `streamlist/src/theme/colors.ts`
- `streamlist/src/components/skeletons/HomeScreenSkeleton.tsx`

Both **Watch now** and **Details** call `navigation` to the same **Detail** screen as the rest of Home (the app has no separate player). **Tests** (`npx jest --no-watchman`): all 12 suites pass; **ESLint** on the edited screen is clean.

---

_**User**_

make hero banner in portrait and dynamic accroding to mobile sizes.

---

## What changed

### Portrait + responsive sizing
- The hero is **2:3** (standard poster) like your cards: height = `homeHeroPortraitHeight(contentWidth, windowHeight)` in `contentCardLayout.ts`, where `contentWidth` is the Home content width (window minus `spacing.md` padding on each side).
- **Clamps** keep it usable: not shorter than `spacing.xl * 4 + spacing.md`, not taller than the smaller of **50% of the window height** and **`spacing.lg * 20`** (so it scales on small phones and does not take over the screen on tall devices).

### Visual / assets
- Art uses the **movie poster** (`w500` via new `IMAGE_SIZE_HERO` in `image.ts`) when `poster_path` is present, otherwise the **backdrop** as before.
- The image is sized with a **fixed dynamic height** (not a wide 16:9 aspect).

### Typography and controls
- When content width is below `spacing.lg * 16`, the title uses **`headlineMd`-sized** type instead of `displayMd` to avoid huge copy on small phones.
- The play icon size scales with content width, clamped with spacing tokens.

### Other files
- `HomeScreenSkeleton`: portrait hero height uses the same helper; overlay shims match the real bottom-aligned CTA.
- `contentCardLayout.test.ts`: tests for `homeHorizontalContentWidth` and `homeHeroPortraitHeight`.

**Files:** `src/screens/HomeScreen.tsx`, `src/utils/contentCardLayout.ts`, `src/utils/image.ts`, `src/components/skeletons/HomeScreenSkeleton.tsx`, `__tests__/contentCardLayout.test.ts`

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Adjusting play icon**

I'm reducing the play icon size to fit the slimmer bar, capping it at `spacing.lg` (24) to match the shorter row height. I'm adjusting the button height calculation to fix the inner content area being too small after adding vertical padding. I'm using `minHeight: HERO_BUTTON_MIN_HEIGHT` with `HERO_BUTTON_MIN_HEIGHT` set to 36. I'm removing `paddingVertical` from `heroButtonBase` to prevent double-counting with `minHeight: 36`. I confirmed that padding in React Native adds to the total height, so I need to adjust `minHeight` to account for `paddingVertical`. 

I'll use only `paddingVertical: spacing.xs` and `paddingHorizontal` to avoid confusion with `minHeight` calculations. </details></think>

## Summary

### Watch now
- Replaced the stacked “Watch” / “Now” block with a **single line**: play icon + **“Watch now”** in one `Text` next to the icon (`heroWatchNowInner` stays a row).
- Dropped `heroWatchNowTextCol` and `heroWatchNowLine`; added `heroWatchNowLabel` (same `titleSm` + `secondary_container` as before).

### Button height
- Base height is lower: **`HERO_BUTTON_COMPACT_FLOOR`** = `spacing.lg + spacing.xs` (was `spacing.lg * 2 + spacing.xs`).
- **Both** primary and secondary buttons use a shared **`heroActionButtonHeight`**: `max(HERO_BUTTON_COMPACT_FLOOR, heroPlayIconSize + spacing.xxs)` so the row stays one line and still fits a larger play icon on wide devices.
- `heroButtonBase` no longer has a fixed `minHeight` in `StyleSheet`; the pressables get `minHeight: heroActionButtonHeight` in the `style` array so both match.

### Skeleton
- `heroButtonShimmer` height updated to `spacing.lg + spacing.xs` to match the slimmer default.

**Files:** `src/screens/HomeScreen.tsx`, `src/components/skeletons/HomeScreenSkeleton.tsx`

## Summary

### Taller buttons
- **`HERO_BUTTON_COMPACT_FLOOR`** is now `spacing.lg + spacing.sm` (36) instead of `spacing.lg + spacing.xs` (32).
- **`heroActionButtonHeight`** uses `heroPlayIconSize + spacing.xs` instead of `+ spacing.xxs` so the dynamic height also gains a little padding.
- **Skeleton** button shims use `spacing.lg + spacing.sm` to match.

### Centered labels
- **`heroWatchNowInner`**: `alignSelf: 'stretch'` and `width: '100%'` so the row fills the control; `justifyContent: 'center'` keeps the icon and “Watch now” centered as a group.
- **`heroWatchNowLabel`**: `textAlign: 'center'`.
- **`heroDetailsLabel`**: `width: '100%'` and `textAlign: 'center'` so “Details” is centered in the secondary control.

`heroButtonBase` still uses `alignItems: 'center'` and `justifyContent: 'center'`, so content stays centered vertically in the new height.

**Files:** `src/screens/HomeScreen.tsx`, `src/components/skeletons/HomeScreenSkeleton.tsx`
